problem_text_cn:
四、(15分) 某业余无线电玩家住在A镇，他经常与分别住在B镇和C市的两位友人用无线电相互通讯联络。他希望当他与其中一人通讯时，另一个不能同时收到信号。因此他在住家的空地上竖立了两根垂直于地面的发射天线S₁和S₂，可以同时发出信号，并使两个发射信号之间的相位差可在每次发射前调整，采用的无线电波的波长为λ。如图所示，给定的AB方向线朝AC方向线逆时针转角$ φ < π $；图中S₁，A，S₂三点共线，连线长度记为r；AB方向线沿逆时针方向到S₁S₂方向线的转角记α(顺时针方向转角α为负)；A，B间距和A，C间距远大于r和λ。
(1) 取不同的α，找出r可取得的最小值$r_{\min}$；
(2) 取$r_{\min}$，画出S₁AS₂连接相对AB连线的方位图，标出相应α角的旋转方向；
(3) 取$r_{\min}$，对给定的发射功率，为使B镇友人收到的信号达最强，试求输入S₁，S₂信号间的相位差。
problem_text_en:
Four. (15 points) An amateur radio enthusiast lives in Town A and often communicates wirelessly with friends in Town B and City C, respectively. He wishes that when he communicates with one of them, the other cannot simultaneously receive the signal. Therefore, he sets up two vertical transmitting antennas S₁ and S₂ in the open ground at his home. The antennas can transmit signals simultaneously, and the phase difference between the two transmitted signals can be adjusted before each transmission. The radio wave used has wavelength λ. As shown in the figure, the line AB rotates counterclockwise relative to the line AC by an angle $φ < π$. In the figure, points S₁, A, and S₂ are collinear, and the length of the connecting line is denoted as r. The rotation angle from the direction line AB to the line S₁S₂ in the counterclockwise direction is denoted as α (clockwise rotation angle α is negative). The distances between A and B, and between A and C are much greater than r and λ.
(1) For different values of α, find the minimum value $r_{\min}$ that r can take.
(2) Taking $r_{\min}$, draw the azimuth diagram of the line S₁AS₂ relative to the line AB, and mark the rotation direction of the corresponding angle α.
(3) Taking $r_{\min}$, for a given transmitted power, to maximize the signal received by the friend in Town B, find the phase difference between the signals input to S₁ and S₂.
problem_solution_cn:
四、(15分)
(1) 将输入到S₁，S₂的信号相位差记为θ，则此两信号传播至B，C时的相位差分别为
$$ \Delta\theta_{B}=2\pi\left(\frac{r\cos\alpha}{\lambda}\right)+\theta,\qquad\Delta\theta_{C}=2\pi\left[\frac{r\cos(\phi-\alpha)}{\lambda}\right]+\theta, $$
为使B，C两地接收者不能同时检测到信号，须有
$$ \Delta\theta_{B}-\Delta\theta_{C}=(2n+1)\pi,\quad n\text{为任意整数} $$
即
$$ 2\pi\frac{r}{\lambda}[\cos\alpha-\cos(\phi-\alpha)]=2(n+1)\pi, $$
$$ \Rightarrow 2\pi\frac{r}{\lambda}\left[-2\sin\frac{\phi}{2}\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)\right]=2(n+1)\pi, $$
$$ \Rightarrow r=-(2n+1)\lambda\Big/\left[4\sin\frac{\phi}{2}\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)\right]. $$
取$n=0$，则因$\sin\phi>0$，为使$r_{\min}$取正，要求$\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)=-1$，即得
$$ \alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}=-\frac{\pi}{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad\alpha=\frac{\phi}{2}-\frac{\pi}{2}<0, $$
对应：$r_{\min}=\dfrac{\lambda}{4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}}$.

(2) 取解$\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}-\dfrac{\pi}{2}<0$，即$|\alpha|+\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$时，所求方位关系如题解图1所示，S₁AS₂连线垂直于φ角平分线。
取解$\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}+\dfrac{\pi}{2}>\dfrac{\pi}{2}$，即$\alpha-\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$时，所求方位关系如题解图2所示，仍有S₁AS₂连线垂直于φ角平分线。

(3) 为使B接收到的信号最强，应有
$$ \begin{cases}\Delta\theta_{B}=2\pi\left(\dfrac{r\cos\alpha}{\lambda}\right)+\theta=2k\pi,\;k\text{为任意整数},\\[2pt]
r=r_{\min}=\lambda\Big/\left(4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}\right),\;\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}+\dfrac{\pi}{2},\end{cases} $$
即得
$$ \theta=2k\pi-2\pi\,\frac{\cos\left(\dfrac{\phi}{2}-\dfrac{\pi}{2}\right)}{4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}}=2k\pi\mp\frac{\pi}{2}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Four. (15 points)
(1) Let the phase difference between the signals input to S₁ and S₂ be θ. Then the phase differences of these two signals when they propagate to B and C are, respectively,
$$ \Delta\theta_{B}=2\pi\left(\frac{r\cos\alpha}{\lambda}\right)+\theta,\qquad\Delta\theta_{C}=2\pi\left[\frac{r\cos(\phi-\alpha)}{\lambda}\right]+\theta. $$
To ensure that the receivers at B and C cannot detect the signals simultaneously, it is required that
$$ \Delta\theta_{B}-\Delta\theta_{C}=(2n+1)\pi,\quad n\text{ is any integer}. $$
That is,
$$ 2\pi\frac{r}{\lambda}[\cos\alpha-\cos(\phi-\alpha)]=2(n+1)\pi, $$
$$ \Rightarrow 2\pi\frac{r}{\lambda}\left[-2\sin\frac{\phi}{2}\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)\right]=2(n+1)\pi, $$
$$ \Rightarrow r=-(2n+1)\lambda\Big/\left[4\sin\frac{\phi}{2}\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)\right]. $$
Take $n=0$. Since $\sin\phi>0$, to make $r_{\min}$ positive, we require $\sin\left(\alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}\right)=-1$, giving
$$ \alpha-\frac{\phi}{2}=-\frac{\pi}{2},\quad\Rightarrow\quad\alpha=\frac{\phi}{2}-\frac{\pi}{2}<0, $$
corresponding to $r_{\min}=\dfrac{\lambda}{4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}}$.

(2) Taking the solution $\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}-\dfrac{\pi}{2}<0$, i.e., $|\alpha|+\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$, the required azimuth relationship is shown in solution diagram 1: the line S₁AS₂ is perpendicular to the bisector of angle φ.
Taking the solution $\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}+\dfrac{\pi}{2}>\dfrac{\pi}{2}$, i.e., $\alpha-\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$, the required azimuth relationship is shown in solution diagram 2: the line S₁AS₂ is still perpendicular to the bisector of angle φ.

(3) To maximize the signal received at B, we must have
$$ \begin{cases}\Delta\theta_{B}=2\pi\left(\dfrac{r\cos\alpha}{\lambda}\right)+\theta=2k\pi,\;k\text{ is any integer},\\[2pt]
r=r_{\min}=\lambda\Big/\left(4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}\right),\;\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}+\dfrac{\pi}{2},\end{cases} $$
hence
$$ \theta=2k\pi-2\pi\,\frac{\cos\left(\dfrac{\phi}{2}-\dfrac{\pi}{2}\right)}{4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}}=2k\pi\mp\frac{\pi}{2}. $$
img_cn: 题目的几何关系示意图。图中有点A、B、C，以及两点S₁、S₂。S₁、A、S₂三点共线，标记距离r。AB方向线与AC方向线的夹角为φ，且AB到S₁S₂的转角为α。A、B间距和A、C间距远大于r和λ。

解题过程图，展示了两个方位关系图示。
题解图1：S₁AS₂连线垂直于φ角平分线，此时$|\alpha|+\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$。
题解图2：S₁AS₂连线垂直于φ角平分线，此时$\alpha-\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$。
img_en: Geometric relationship diagram for the problem. Points A, B, C, and two points S₁, S₂ are shown. S₁, A, and S₂ are collinear, with distance r marked. The angle between the direction lines AB and AC is φ, and the rotation angle from AB to S₁S₂ is α. The distances between A and B, and between A and C are much greater than r and λ.

Solution diagrams showing two azimuth relationship diagrams.
Solution diagram 1: The line S₁AS₂ is perpendicular to the bisector of angle φ, corresponding to $|\alpha|+\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$.
Solution diagram 2: The line S₁AS₂ is perpendicular to the bisector of angle φ, corresponding to $\alpha-\dfrac{\phi}{2}=\dfrac{\pi}{2}$.
problem_answer:
(1) $r_{\min}=\dfrac{\lambda}{4\sin\dfrac{\phi}{2}}$。
(2) 当$\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}-\dfrac{\pi}{2}$时，S₁AS₂连线垂直于φ角平分线，旋转方向为负（顺时针）；当$\alpha=\dfrac{\phi}{2}+\dfrac{\pi}{2}$时，连线仍垂直于φ角平分线，旋转方向为正（逆时针）。
(3) 相位差$\theta=2k\pi\mp\dfrac{\pi}{2}$，其中k为任意整数。
